name: Dinosaur Evolution IO
description: Grow your dragon and take it to the peak of evolution! Eat fruits, defeat other players, and become the most powerful creature in this world. Choose your playstyle — will you be a fast and aggressive hunter, or a careful strategist who defends their territory? Dive into an exciting growth and evolution journey, upgrade your dragon’s abilities, and adapt to a constantly changing world. Explore new areas and become a true legend among dragons! Features: • Eat, fight, and survive in fast-paced battles • Evolve and reach new stages of evolution • Unlock and explore new territories • Become the strongest dragon in the game!
instructions: On PC bull WASD mdash movement control On mobile bull Swipe on the screen mdash movement
